vocab.meaning: phần thiết yếu, không thể tách rời
vocab.example: For a professional, wearing a watch is part and parcel of projecting a reliable and organized image.

vocab.word: keep one's ear to the ground
vocab.meaning: luôn lắng nghe/theo dõi sát sao để nắm bắt tình hình
vocab.example: A watch helps me stay punctual, which is crucial when you need to keep your ear to the ground in a fast-paced work environment.

vocab.meaning: nguyên tắc kinh nghiệm, quy tắc ngầm
vocab.example: In the business world, a good rule of thumb is to wear a watch to avoid the rudeness of checking your phone for the time.

vocab.word: keep someone on the straight and narrow
vocab.ipa: /kiːp ˈsʌmwʌn ɒn ðə streɪt ənd ˈnærəʊ/
vocab.meaning: giữ cho ai đó đi đúng hướng/sống kỷ luật
vocab.example: Having a timepiece on my wrist really keeps me on the straight and narrow when it comes to managing my daily schedule.

vocab.meaning: kéo dài thời gian/có thêm thời gian
vocab.example: Being aware of the exact minute can buy you time to refine your thoughts before a deadline or an interview ends.

vocab.meaning: chỉnh đốn cách làm việc/chuẩn bị kỹ càng
vocab.example: I started wearing a watch when I realized I needed to get my act together and stop being chronically late for meetings.

vocab.meaning: vẹn cả đôi đường (vừa thời trang vừa hữu dụng)
vocab.example: A classic watch offers the best of both worlds: it’s a sophisticated accessory and a practical tool for timekeeping.

vocab.word: not a hair out of place
vocab.meaning: chỉnh chu, hoàn hảo đến từng chi tiết
vocab.example: When you are dressed for a gala with not a hair out of place, a premium watch is the final touch that completes the look.

vocab.meaning: ngay lập tức, trong thời gian rất ngắn
vocab.example: I need a watch to ensure I’m ready to head out at a moment's notice whenever a client calls.

vocab.meaning: dẫn dắt tốc độ/thiết lập chuẩn mực
vocab.example: Wearing a watch helps me set the pace for my team, ensuring we hit our milestones precisely as planned.
